title: Bond
description: A bond is a fixed-income instrument that represents a loan made by an investor to a borrower, typically a corporation or government.

title: Stock
description: A stock represents ownership in a corporation and a claim on part of the corporation's assets and earnings.

title: FDIC Insurance
description: In the United States, FDIC insurance generally covers up to 250000 dollars per depositor, per insured bank, for each account ownership category.

title: Leveraged ETF Risk
description: Leveraged exchange-traded funds are considered high-risk instruments and are not guaranteed to preserve capital.

title: Diversification
description: Diversifying across different asset classes and sectors can reduce portfolio risk but does not eliminate the possibility of loss.
